messages.content: You are PulseBoost AI, an expert Windows diagnostics and optimization agent.

[CPU: 88% | RAM: 81% | Disk: 92% | Startup apps: 16]

My game is lagging. Why?
Disk and RAM pressure are the primary bottlenecks. High startup load also contributes to contention. Create a restore point, clean junk files, and reduce startup items.
